results.title: France also seeks to ban children from using social networks
results.description: French lawmakers will vote on the 21st of July on a law that would ban social networks for children under 15, joining several countries considering the unpopular move among teenagers, Reuters reports. If passed, France would follow Australia’s example, which banned children from platforms such as Facebook, Instagram, Snapchat, TikTok and YouTube last December.
